---
layout: archive
title: "CV"
permalink: /cv/
author_profile: true
redirect_from:
  - /resume
---

<style>
/* Hide the default page title generated by Minimal Mistakes */
.page__title {
  display: none !important;
}

.cv-page {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  color: #2f3f46;
  line-height: 1.65;
  font-size: 0.96rem;
}

.cv-page * {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

.cv-hero {
  padding: 2.1rem 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.1rem;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7fbfd 0%, #eef6fa 55%, #ffffff 100%);
  border: 1px solid #dfeaf0;
}

.cv-name {
  margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0;
  font-size: 2.15rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 750;
  color: #17324d;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
}

.cv-position {
  margin: 0 0 1.15rem 0;
  color: #496273;
  font-size: 1.03rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.cv-summary {
  max-width: 840px;
  margin: 0;
  color: #40545d;
  font-size: 0.98rem;
}

.cv-contact {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
}

.cv-contact a,
.cv-contact span {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.36rem 0.72rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #d9e7ee;
  color: #31546b;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.cv-contact a:hover {
  color: #174f7a;
  border-color: #bcd5e3;
  background: #f8fcff;
}

.cv-section {
  margin-bottom: 2.2rem;
}

.cv-section-title {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.05rem 0;
  font-size: 1.32rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  color: #17324d;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.cv-section-title::after {
  content: "";
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #cbdde7, transparent);
}

.cv-card {
  padding: 1.05rem 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e3edf2;
  box-shadow: 0 5px 18px rgba(38, 50, 56, 0.025);
}

.cv-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.32rem 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.42;
  color: #27353b;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.cv-card p {
  margin: 0.15rem 0;
  color: #536b76;
  font-size: 0.91rem;
}

.cv-meta {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
  color: #1f5f8b;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.cv-grid-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0.85rem;
}

.cv-timeline {
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 1.15rem;
}

.cv-timeline::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.35rem;
  bottom: 0.35rem;
  left: 0.24rem;
  width: 2px;
  background: #d7e6ee;
}

.cv-timeline-item {
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 1.05rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}

.cv-timeline-item::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0.42rem;
  left: -0.06rem;
  width: 0.55rem;
  height: 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #2d7ea8;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #edf6fa;
}

.cv-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.52rem;
}

.cv-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.7rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f7fbfd;
  border: 1px solid #dce9ef;
  color: #355a70;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.cv-funding-card {
  padding: 1.15rem 1.25rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 15px;
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e0ebf1;
  box-shadow: 0 5px 18px rgba(38, 50, 56, 0.025);
}

.cv-funding-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
  font-weight: 750;
  color: #27353b;
}

.cv-funding-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 118px 1fr;
  column-gap: 0.8rem;
  row-gap: 0.34rem;
  font-size: 0.91rem;
}

.cv-label {
  color: #607985;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.cv-value {
  color: #435964;
}

.cv-role {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.18rem 0.56rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #edf6fb;
  color: #1b5d8c;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.cv-role-pi {
  background: #eaf7ef;
  color: #287348;
}

.cv-role-major {
  background: #fff4df;
  color: #8a5b00;
}

.cv-highlight-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 0.85rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.cv-highlight {
  padding: 0.95rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #f8fbfd;
  border: 1px solid #dfeaf0;
}

.cv-highlight-year {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: 0.22rem;
  color: #1f5f8b;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.cv-highlight-title {
  margin: 0;
  color: #27353b;
  font-size: 0.94rem;
  font-weight: 750;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.cv-highlight-org {
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  color: #637983;
  font-size: 0.83rem;
}

.cv-list {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  list-style: none;
}

.cv-list li {
  padding: 0.56rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #edf3f6;
  color: #455b65;
  font-size: 0.91rem;
}

.cv-list li:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.cv-year {
  display: inline-block;
  min-width: 4.5rem;
  color: #1f5f8b;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.cv-publication-metrics {
  padding: 1rem 1.15rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.95rem;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #f8fbfd;
  border: 1px solid #dfeaf0;
  color: #40545d;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.cv-publication-metrics strong {
  color: #17324d;
}

.cv-note {
  padding: 1rem 1.15rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: #fbfcfd;
  border: 1px solid #e5edf1;
  color: #607985;
  font-size: 0.89rem;
}

@media screen and (max-width: 760px) {
  .cv-hero {
    padding: 1.5rem 1.2rem;
  }

  .cv-name {
    font-size: 1.75rem;
  }

  .cv-grid-2,
  .cv-highlight-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .cv-funding-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    row-gap: 0.12rem;
  }

  .cv-label {
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="cv-page">

  <section class="cv-hero">
    <h1 class="cv-name">Kai-Qi Li</h1>

    <p class="cv-position">
      Incoming Professor, Wuhan University · Postdoctoral Fellow, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University
    </p>

    <p class="cv-summary">
      My research lies at the intersection of geotechnical engineering, computational geomechanics,
      uncertainty quantification, and artificial intelligence. I develop mechanics-informed and data-enabled
      approaches for understanding, predicting, and managing complex geo-systems, with applications in
      frozen soils, underground construction, infrastructure resilience, and multi-physics geo-processes.
    </p>

    <div class="cv-contact">
      <a href="mailto:kqcee.li@polyu.edu.hk">kqcee.li@polyu.edu.hk</a>
      <a href="mailto:kqceeli@163.com">kqceeli@163.com</a>
      <a href="https://kqceeli.github.io/" target="_blank">Website</a>
      <span>Google Scholar: h-index 24</span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cv-section">
    <h2 class="cv-section-title">Research Interests</h2>

    <div class="cv-tags">
      <span class="cv-tag">AI in Geotechnical Engineering</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Geotechnical Risk and Reliability</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Constitutive Modelling of Soils</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Random Finite Element Method</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Multiscale and Multiphysics Modelling</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Uncertainty Quantification and Propagation</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Artificial Ground Freezing</span>
      <span class="cv-tag">Frozen Soils</span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cv-section">
    <h2 class="cv-section-title">Professional Experience</h2>

    <div class="cv-timeline">

      <div class="cv-timeline-item">

        </div>
      </div>

          <h3>Postdoctoral Fellow</h3>
          <p>The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Hong Kong SAR</p>
          <p>Mentor: Prof. YIN Zhen-Yu</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cv-section">
    <h2 class="cv-section-title">Education</h2>

    <div class="cv-timeline">

      <div class="cv-timeline-item">
        <div class="cv-card">
          <span class="cv-meta">09/2017 – 06/2022</span>
          <h3>Ph.D. in Hydraulic Structure Engineering</h3>
          <p>Wuhan University, China</p>
          <p>Supervisors: Prof. LIU Yong and Prof. LI Dian-Qing</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="cv-timeline-item">
        <div class="cv-card">
          <span class="cv-meta">03/2021 – 03/2022</span>
          <h3>Visiting Ph.D. Student in Geotechnical Engineering</h3>
          <p>National University of Singapore, Singapore</p>
          <p>Supervisor: Prof. LEE Fook-Hou</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="cv-timeline-item">

          <h3>B.E. in Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering</h3>
          <p>Northwest A&amp;F University, China</p>

    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="cv-section">
    <h2 class="cv-section-title">Research Funding</h2>

    <div class="cv-funding-card">
      <h3 class="cv-funding-title">
        Thermo-hydro-mechanical-chemical coupling in hydrate-bearing sediments:
        a physics-informed neural networks-based simulator

      </div>

  <section class="cv-section">
    <h2 class="cv-section-title">Publications</h2>

    <div class="cv-publication-metrics">
      <strong>Google Scholar:</strong> 1,622 citations · h-index 24 · i10-index 30 ·
      5 ESI Highly Cited Papers. Updated on 29/04/2026.
    </div>

    <div class="cv-card">
      <h3>Representative Recent Publications</h3>
      <ul class="cv-list">
        <li>Li KQ, Yin ZY, Liu Y. AGFNN: A smart platform for uncertainty-aware prediction of freezing time in artificial ground freezing. <em>Tunnelling and Underground Space Technology</em>, 2026.</li>
        <li>Liu XQ, Li KQ*, Yin ZY. AGF-PINN-HC: Hard-constrained enhanced physics-informed neural networks for multi-pipe heat transfer in artificial ground freezing. <em>Canadian Geotechnical Journal</em>, 2026.</li>
        <li>Li KQ, Yin ZY. Relative ice saturation and unified elastoplastic modelling of frozen soils. <em>Journal of Geotechnical and Geoenvironmental Engineering</em>, 2025.</li>
        <li>Li KQ, Yin ZY, Zhang N, Liu HC. Physics-informed neural networks for solving steady-state temperature field in artificial ground freezing. <em>Canadian Geotechnical Journal</em>, 2025.</li>

        <li>Li KQ, Yin ZY, Liu Y. Influences of spatial variability of hydrothermal properties on the freezing process in artificial ground freezing technique. <em>Computers and Geotechnics</em>, 2023. ESI Highly Cited Paper.</li>
